title: 🪦 Semiotic Grief Stacks
name: Semiotic Grief Stacks
what_it_is: Layered symbols of loss—stacked signs of mourning that accumulate like sediment, forming sorrow architecture.
how_to_use: his grief is structured—each symbol another tier in the sorrow stack
she wears grief in signs—memories encoded into vertical mourning columns
animation_behavior: Stack grows as emotion rises, each layer flickers with memory, structure quivers when touched ---
